item.title: Uber ‘Autonomous Solutions’ Reveals Their Strategy, Is It Enough?
item.description: Uber wants to provide all the many other ingredients of self-driving beyond the vehicle, including of course the ride hail

item.title: AI Is Making Us Less Creative, But There’s A Fix
item.description: A new study says AI is making people less creative. But is that due to our over-dependance on AI, or to mistakes in how we're using it?

item.title: Northern Lights Forecast: 10 States Could See Aurora Tuesday Night
item.description: NOAA is forecasting elevated solar wind conditions on Tuesday, Feb. 24, through Wednesday, Feb 25, with the aurora borealis possible in northern U.S. ...

item.title: Amazon’s AWS Debuts AI Tool That Automates Clipping Live Sports For Social Media
item.description: AWS launches Elemental Inference tools to automate finding, clipping, adding metadata and distributing vertical video highlights from live sports even...

item.title: The Business Case For Prioritizing The Human Side Of AI
item.description: Organizations that see productivity gains are thinking about people changes alongside process changes.
